evidence: MoSPI defines PFCE as expenditure of resident households and NPISH and says the two are estimated together and are not available separately.

evidence: The source is a P31-type final-consumption measure for households and NPISH combined, not strict household S14 HFCE/P31DC.

evidence: Official methodology explicitly includes NPISH and states that household and NPISH final consumption are not separately available.
source_authority: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation

evidence: The commodity-flow method deducts consumption on government account and other final uses outside households and NPISH.
source_authority: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation

evidence: Official methodology includes imputed gross rent of owner-occupied dwellings.
source_authority: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation

evidence: Statement 5.1 exposes alcohol, tobacco and narcotics as separate item codes 2.1, 2.2 and 2.3.

evidence: The workbook has an explicit current-price block in INR crore.

evidence: The workbook exposes fiscal year 2021-22 and the adapter preserves that label.
